title: Project portofolio with Gantt Chart Displaying [Project Name + Group Name + Tasks + Subtasks]
excerpt: Hello Community, I need to create a gantt chart project portofolio view that inlude the project name + group name + tasks + subtasks. Everything on the same view and repeated for each project within the project portofoli…

posts.author: m.delpiano (Marco)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Community, I need to create a gantt chart project portofolio view that inlude the project name + group name + tasks + subtasks. Everything on the same view and repeated for each project within the project portofolio. I dont want the group to appear as a colored legenda item, with associated colors, i want to actually see it on the gantt chart view and be able to collapse it. Group by feature in gantt seem to be very rigid. It’s not possible to specify 2 or more level of grouping hierarchies. Can you please provide your feedback on this ? Am i missing something ?

posts.author: themondaymaster (The Monday Master)
posts.cookedHtml: @m.delpiano I don’t think you’re missing anything. Just tested it myself and am able to get everything you’re looking for into a single view except both Project & Group as labels. It sounds like you’ve gotten as far as color by group which is as customized as you can get.
